title: The BookProof 14-Day Replacement Guarantee
subtitle: We stand behind every review we deliver. If Amazon removes a validated review within 14 days, we replace it — completely free.

protected.title: Your Investment Is Protected
protected.description: Every credit you spend is backed by our guarantee. If a review disappears within 14 days of validation, it counts as a replacement slot — no additional credits needed.

monitored.title: Active Review Monitoring
monitored.description: Our team regularly checks all validated review links. When a removal is detected within the guarantee window, we immediately initiate a replacement without you having to ask.

automatic.title: Automatic Replacement Process
automatic.description: The replacement reader is pulled from your campaign queue automatically. You don't need to do anything — we handle the entire reassignment process behind the scenes.

transparent.title: Full Transparency in Reports
transparent.description: Your campaign report shows total reviews delivered, replacements made, and final retention rate. You always know exactly what happened with every review.

steps.label: Detected
steps.desc: Our team detects removal within 14 days

steps.label: Initiated
steps.desc: Replacement assigned from your campaign queue

steps.label: Complete
steps.desc: New review delivered at no extra cost

note: Guarantee applies to reviews removed within 14 days of admin validation. Reviews removed after 14 days are not covered but represent a very small percentage of delivered reviews.
